ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "recency" INTEGER /* Days since the last purchase */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made */,
  "monetary" REAL /* Total monetary value spent by the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of each order */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfm_scores" (
  "rfm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for RFM score entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "r_rank" REAL /* Rank based on recency */,
  "f_rank" REAL /* Rank based on frequency */,
  "m_rank" REAL /* Rank based on monetary value */,
  "rfm_score" REAL /* Calculated RFM score for the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment ID */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rfm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfm_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "segment_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for segment classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target customer segment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  "target_customers" INTEGER /* Target number of customers for the campaign */,
  "actual_customers" INTEGER /* Actual number of customers reached by the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effectiveness record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marketing campaign ID */,
  "total_customers_reached" INTEGER /* Total number of customers reached by the campaign */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions resulting from the campaign */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_effectiveness_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was recorded */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the campaign or service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, update profile, campaign analysis) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity took place */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " ORDER_HISTORY" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)
